name: ItemSearch_Tool

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
ENDPOINT: /load/SLItems

Headers:

X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <YOUR_SITE>
Query Parameters:

Parameter: properties
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: Comma-separated list of item properties to return. Example: Item, Description

Parameter: filter
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: Filter expression for exact match.

If Item is provided: Example: Item='ITEM0001'
If Description is provided instead: Example: Description='Bicycle, Model-30, 26"'
Example Requests:

To check existence of item number ITEM0001:
/load/SLItems?properties=Item,Description&filter=Item='ITEM0001'

To check existence of an item by description Bicycle, Model-30, 26":
/load/SLItems?properties=Item,Description&filter=Description='Bicycle, Model-30, 26"'
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object containing an Items array.
If the item exists, the Items array contains one or more objects with the requested properties (e.g., Item, Description).
Example existing item response:
{
"Items": [
{
"Item": "ITEM0001",
"Description": "Bicycle, Model-30, 26"",
"_ItemId": "PBT=[item] item.ID=[a1b2c3d4-5678-9101-1121-314151617181]"
}
],
"MoreRowsExist": false,
"Success": true,
"Message": null
}

If the item does not exist, the Items array is empty.
Example non-existing item response:
{
"Items": [],
"MoreRowsExist": false,
"Success": true,
"Message": null
}

HTTP Status Code:
200 OK indicates a successful API call regardless of whether the item was found.
No separate error codes are expected specifically for non-existing items.

instructions:
Use this tool to verify if a specific item exists in CSI/Syteline.

This tool performs an exact match search on the item (Item) using the /load/SLItems API. If the item number is missing from the input, the tool searches for the item based on the description (Description) instead.

If the item exists, the tool returns details including the item number, description, and any other requested properties.

If the item does not exist, the tool returns an empty result, indicating no matching item found.

This check applies across all items regardless of status or warehouse.

Use this tool when the prompt requires validation of an item number, or when the description is the only available input.
